description: The ``Dequip Tool`` node makes a user take off a tool from their hand of a specific side of that user.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to dequip the tool on one side of the user.
fields.User: The user to dequip the tool from.
fields.PopOff: Should the tool pop off a certain distance from your hand.
fields.OnDequipped: Fires when the tool is dequipped.
fields.OnDequipFail: Fires when the tool failed to dequip in any way.
